# format: html5-dompatch-v2
# status: active

Batch index=0 size=21
CreateDocument key=1 doctype=<none>
CreateDocumentType key=2 name="html" public-id=<none> system-id=<none>
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=3
CreateElement key=4 ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=3 child=4
CreateElement key=5 ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=3 child=5
CreateElement key=6 ns=html local="template" attrs=[]
CreateTemplateContents host=6 contents=7
AppendChild parent=5 child=6
CreateText key=8 text="outer"
AppendChild parent=7 child=8
CreateElement key=9 ns=html local="template" attrs=[]
CreateTemplateContents host=9 contents=10
AppendChild parent=7 child=9
CreateElement key=11 ns=html local="b" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=10 child=11
CreateText key=12 text="inner"
AppendChild parent=11 child=12
